use_cases: Interactive clickable elements for pagination navigation
Form submission triggers within pagination controls
Primary action buttons with multiple style variants
Accessible button components with keyboard navigation support
Composite UI elements using Radix UI Slot composition pattern
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Part of the Ruixen.Ui design system, designed as an atomic reusable element suitable for pagination controls, form buttons, and interactive UI elements across desktop and mobile platforms.
